text: Chup rehna tumhari majboori lag raha hai, ghar ki shanti ke liye...

text: Bilkul, child pressure aur saas ke taano ke beech lagta hai main kho gayi. Hatheliyon mein paseena tab badhta hai jab rona bhi nahi chahti par andar sab bhar gaya ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 mein shame of needing help aur label ka darr reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut ghut rahi ho, aur saath mein yeh sharm bhi hai ki agar help maangi toh log tumhe natak ya kamzor samjhenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola. Migraine aur peeth ka dard subah se sham tak chipka rehta hai, aur koi samajhta hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Metro ghar + child pressure reality jodkar feelings normalise karna aur worth alag karna.
text: Jo tum mehsoos kar rahi ho woh valid hai. Child pressure aur saas ke taano ke beech body ka tootna aur migraine Metro ghar mein sadly common hai. Tumhari keemat report ya natak wale label se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gayi hoon. Bechaini bhar gayi andar, bas andhere kamre mein sona achha lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Homemaker + child pressure context mein invisible pain pattern ek baar normalise karna.
text: Ghar sambhalne wali maa ke role mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - report clear ho phir bhi migraine aur dard rahe. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki natak bolne ka darr chipka rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai thoda. Ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhota sa step chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 under-10-min options dena jo ghar duty ke saath fit hon.
text: Teen seedhe options: (1) andhere kamre ki jagah 5 minute dim soft light mein baitho, aankh band; (2) ek line likho - migraine aur peeth ka dard kab tez hota hai; (3) ek bharose wale ko calmly bolo, 'symptoms real hain, support chahiye'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Soft light wala try kiya, thoda aaram mila. Migraine bhi thodi kam feel ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Light + breath ko step-by-step ek baar chalwana.
text: Pehle room mein soft light on karo, phone side rakho. Phir kursi pe baith ke 4 count andar saans, 6 count bahar, 6 baar. Phir ek line likho - 'aaj migraine kab tez thi'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar liya. Hatheliyon mein paseena kam hua, sar bhi thoda halka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Health context mein systemic reframe: normal report ke saath bhi pain real ho sakta hai.
text: Report normal aaye phir bhi migraine, peeth ka dard aur haath mein paseena real ho sakta hai, especially jab child pressure aur ghar ka stress mile. Yeh natak nahi, overload ka signal ho sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke guilt kam hua. Badan mein tootan bhi thodi kam lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal ke liye do micro options dena bina extra bojh ke.
text: Kal ke liye do chhote options: (1) subah pehle 2 minute neck aur kamar stretch; (2) migraine tez ho toh thanda kapda maatha pe 1 minute, phir paani dheere piyo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Stretch aur maatha wala try karungi. Bechaini bhi thodi kam lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki practical plan ko validate karna.
text: Yeh grounded plan tumhare liye sahi hai. Tum apne sharir ki awaaz sun rahi ho, yeh hi strong step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, peeth ka dard bhi thoda manageable hai ab. Pehle jaisa panic nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se body relief mirror karna.
text: Jo hatheliyon mein paseena aur badan ki tootan thi, woh ab thodi loose pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab lag raha main sambhal lungi. Ghar pe bhi ek baar calmly baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe se self-blame kam karna.
text: Accent par mazaak aur ghar ka stress jab saath aayein, body mein bechaini aur dard badhna natural hai. Yeh tumhari nakaami nahi, pressure ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab theek lag raha. Andhere kamre wala majboorpan kam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Settled state aur communication intent validate karna.
text: Calmly baat karna tumhari side se mature step hai. Tumne aaj body ko bhi aur apni dignity ko bhi sambhala.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya, sun ke hi sharir ne thoda chhoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se heard hone par relational ease mirror karna.
text: Jab tumhari baat suni gayi, tab sharir ne bhi thoda saans liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, mann shaant hai ab. Raat achhi guzar jayegi shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke liye do micro options dena.
text: Raat ke liye bas do cheezein: screen jaldi band karo, aur sone se pehle ek glass paani dheere piyo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, tayyar hoon. Aaj ka plan simple rakhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Preparedness aur pacing reinforce karna.
text: Yeh simple pace tumhare liye sustainable hai. Tumne aaj is bhaari pal ke beech bhi apna control wapas liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab sambhal gayi. Kal stretches follow karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se maa + ghar duty ke beech body ki sunna mirror karna.
text: Tumne bachchon ki zimmedari nibhaate hue bhi apni body ki sunna shuru kiya, yeh balance hi aage ka sahara banega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Aaj ke liye itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki settling pace mirror karke close karna.
text: Aaj tumne dheere dheere sharir ko manageable zone mein laaya, aur yeh shift tumhari himmat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho, accent ka mazak uda aur tab se yeh tightness chipki hai. Thakan itni shiddat ki hai ki bacchon ki zimmedari bhi thik se nibha nahi pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se seene ki jakdan aur nichodne jaisa exact body mirror karna.
text: Seene mein aisi jakdan hui hai, jaise dil ko koi nichod raha ho, aur wahi tightness ab chipki hui hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas sharir dhalta ja raha hai. Doctor ne phir stress bol ke dawai likh di, par andar se lagta hai main toot rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe arse se chalti thakan aur sharir ke dhalne mirror karna.
text: Yeh thakan aur sharir ka dhalna kaafi der se build ho raha tha, aur ab zor se upar aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar pe sab bolte hain bimari ka bahana hai kaam se bachne ke liye. Zakhm dikhta nahi par seene mein aisi jakdan hui rehti hai din bhar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se beizzati aur kaamchor bol diye jaane ka implied darr mirror karna.
text: Sabse tez chot yeh lag rahi hai ki tumhari takleef ko log bahana maan kar tumhe chhota kar de rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Isliye chup rehti hoon, warna bol denge zyada bol rahi hoon. Thakan itni shiddat ki hai phir bhi kuch dikhai nahi deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par chhota restatement, Lens C relational mirror.
text: Chup rehna tumhari majboori lag rahi hai, bachchon ki wajah se...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, bachchon ki zimmedari bhi nibhani hai aur seene mein aisi jakdan hui rehti hai tab lagta hai main fail ho rahi hoon maa ban ke bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 mein shame of needing help aur label ka darr reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut thak chuki ho, aur saath mein yeh sharm bhi hai ki agar help maangi toh log tumhe bahana ya kaamchor samjhenge.
